finding_results.notes: The hands paragraph now references only the existing scar as a present visual detail (`the X-Acto scar on his right index finger`) and no longer repeats the origin story from Chapter 1.

Sentence openings were varied across all three scenes with object-led, temporal, and situational starts replacing the chapter's prior repetitive `He...` cadence. Local verification after revision counted 22 `He`-opened sentences out of 342 total (6.43%), with no run longer than two consecutive `He` openers.

Added post-submit prep material and expanded the closing Valid Anagram beat so the extra length carries pressure and proves Nick is building just enough procedural fluency to be interview-plausible. Local word-count verification after revision: 4540 words.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised Chapter 2 in place to remove the repeated scar backstory, break the chapter-wide `He`-opener monotony, and add pressure-bearing prep material that pushes Nick from solitary flailing into barely plausible interview readiness while preserving the chapter's three-scene architecture and Chapter 3 handoff.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=3, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
